title: Inviting applications for filling up various administrative, technical and secretarial posts in the newly created Directorate of Future, Haryana on a Deputation basis.

Regarding Development, operation and monitoring of Centralized Digital Online Repository with search options, of all State Acts, Rules, Regulations, Government Orders (GOs), Circulars, Notifications, Policies, and relevant official documents (incl. rules/regulations at the municipal level) organized
